input.command:
set -x
NS=karma-rabbitmq-security-upgrade-lifec-447dced7-cluster-a
kubectl -n $NS get secret rabbitmq-tls -o jsonpath='{.data.tls\.crt}' | base64 -d > /tmp/tls.crt
kubectl -n $NS get secret rabbitmq-tls-ca -o jsonpath='{.data.ca\.key}' | base64 -d > /tmp/ca.key
kubectl -n $NS get secret rabbitmq-tls -o jsonpath='{.data.ca\.crt}' | base64 -d > /tmp/ca.crt
which openssl || echo "no local openssl"
openssl x509 -in /tmp/tls.crt -noout -dates -subject -ext subjectAltName 2>&1
